title: ligusticum ovatum
intro: Ligusticum ovatum, also known as Chinese Lovage or Lovage, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ligusticum ovatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Ligusticum ovatum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including the common cold, bronchitis, and digestive issues.
